# Q1 Engineering Sync — Meeting Notes

Attendees: Maya Chen, Diego Ortega, Wei Zhang, Anika Patel, Priya Raman.

Maya Chen confirmed the Platform Team will continue maintaining the shared PostgreSQL clusters used by Aurora and Beacon.

Diego Ortega reported that Sentinel's PyTorch model accuracy improved noticeably after the Q1 retraining run.

Anika Patel approved the hiring plan for two additional engineers on the Platform Team.
